summary: Iteration 51 testing completed for CommandeTab refactoring (Step C). Found and FIXED 2 critical bugs: (1) Missing imports in CommandeTab.jsx (format, AlertTriangle, Receipt, Calculator, Send, Eye, Textarea), (2) Missing ctx props (invoices, total, subtotal, discountAmount, totalByDepartment, DEPARTMENT_CONFIG, PAYMENT_METHODS, closeTable) and wrong prop name (DEPARTMENTS should be DEPARTMENT_CONFIG). After fixes, CommandeTab renders correctly for both Manager and Admin roles with ZERO regression on other tabs.

issues: React hydration warnings about HTML structure (span inside tbody) - pre-existing issue, not related to CommandeTab refactoring

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: Missing imports for format (date-fns), AlertTriangle, Receipt, Calculator, Send, Eye (lucide-react), Textarea (ui)
bugs_found_and_fixed.error: ReferenceError: format is not defined, AlertTriangle is not defined, etc.
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Added missing imports: format from date-fns, AlertTriangle/Receipt/Calculator/Send/Eye from lucide-react, Textarea from ui

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: Missing ctx props and wrong prop name - DEPARTMENTS should be DEPARTMENT_CONFIG, missing invoices, total, subtotal, discountAmount, totalByDepartment, PAYMENT_METHODS, closeTable
bugs_found_and_fixed.error: ReferenceError: DEPARTMENTS is not defined (crashed the entire app)
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Updated destructuring to include all required props: invoices, total, subtotal, discountAmount, totalByDepartment, DEPARTMENT_CONFIG, PAYMENT_METHODS, closeTable

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: ctx prop passed to CommandeTab was missing required props and had wrong prop name (DEPARTMENTS instead of DEPARTMENT_CONFIG)
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Updated ctx prop to include: invoices, total, subtotal, discountAmount, totalByDepartment, DEPARTMENT_CONFIG, PAYMENT_METHODS, closeTable

critical_code_review_comments: The CommandeTab extraction was incomplete - many dependencies were not passed via ctx prop. This is a common issue when extracting large components. Always verify all used variables are either imported or passed as props.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 51 verified the CommandeTab refactoring (Step C). The refactoring extracted ~970 lines of Commande tab JSX from CaissePage.jsx into a new CommandeTab.jsx component. Two critical bugs were found and fixed: (1) Missing imports for format, AlertTriangle, Receipt, Calculator, Send, Eye, Textarea, (2) Missing ctx props (invoices, total, subtotal, discountAmount, totalByDepartment, DEPARTMENT_CONFIG, PAYMENT_METHODS, closeTable) and wrong prop name (DEPARTMENTS should be DEPARTMENT_CONFIG). All features now work correctly for both Manager and Admin roles: table selection, product grid, department switching, adding items to bill, payment method selection, discount/notes, client selection, 'ENVOYER LA COMMANDE' button, admin EN ATTENTE section, admin FACTURES À IMPRIMER section, admin 'Créer une facture (optionnel)' collapsible. Regression test passed for all other tabs (BONS, Achats, Besoins, Fournisseurs, Pourboires, Notes). TablesTab has a pre-existing React hydration warning (span inside tbody) unrelated to this refactoring.

Table bar shows T1 with badge

Prise de commandes tab visible and clickable
EN ATTENTE section visible with pending count
